cause_analysis.narrative: Somar Wellness Spa | Spa Party & Retreat, Body Massage, Body Scrub, Body Sculpting, Body Contouring, Facial churned on 2026-02-05 after 273 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-01-13 via sms — 23 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side. Median Zoca response time was 3.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 23 day(s) before churn via sms. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-01-29 via sms, client wrote: "…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
